entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: The crop species (Cicer arietinum L.) being studied for genetic analysis of seed growth and flowering.

entities.name: SEED GROWTH RATE
entities.description: A trait (SGR) analyzed for genetic parameters and its association with seed weight.

entities.name: PROGRESS TOWARDS FLOWERING
entities.description: A trait (RPF) analyzed for genetic parameters and inheritance.

entities.name: YIELD COMPONENTS
entities.description: A group of traits related to the overall yield of the crop.

entities.name: HAYMAN'S DIALLEL PROCEDURE
entities.description: A genetic analysis method used to estimate genetic parameters in the study.

entities.name: GRIFFING'S DIALLEL PROCEDURE
entities.description: A genetic analysis method used to estimate genetic parameters in the study.

entities.name: GENETIC PARAMETERS
entities.description: Estimates used to understand the inheritance of the studied traits.

entities.name: ADDITIVE GENE EFFECTS
entities.description: A component of genetic variance found to be predominant for RPF, SGR, and seed weight.

entities.name: NON-ADDITIVE GENE EFFECTS
entities.description: A component of genetic variance found to be predominant for pods per plant, seeds per plant, seeds per pod, and seed yield.

entities.name: SEED WEIGHT
entities.description: A trait closely associated with seed growth rate and used as a selection criterion.

entities.name: PODS PER PLANT
entities.description: A yield component trait showing predominant non-additive gene effects.

entities.name: SEEDS PER PLANT
entities.description: A yield component trait showing predominant non-additive gene effects.

entities.name: SEEDS PER POD
entities.description: A yield component trait showing predominant non-additive gene effects.

entities.name: SEED YIELD
entities.description: A trait showing predominant non-additive gene effects and the target for improvement.

entities.name: NARROW-SENSE HERITABILITY
entities.description: A genetic parameter that was high for RPF, SGR, and seed weight.

entities.name: YIELD IMPROVEMENT
entities.description: The objective of using SGR and seed weight as selection criteria.
